raw_cv_text:
Tansy Burns
tansy.burns@gmail.com | (415) 728-3461 | https://github.com/tansyburns/cloud-infrastructure
EDUCATION
Carnegie Mellon University — B.S. Computer Science with Systems Specialization 2012 - 2016
Completed coursework in distributed systems, cloud computing, and network architecture; maintained 3.7 GPA
EXPERIENCE
Stripe — Senior Cloud Infrastructure Engineer Jul 2022 - Present
Led migration of 450+ payment processing services from Kubernetes 1.18 to 1.28, reducing pod latency by 34% and
eliminating $2.1M annual infrastructure costs
Architected multi-region disaster recovery solution handling 100K+ transactions/sec, achieving 99.99% uptime SLA
across 12 AWS regions with automated failover
Mentored team of 6 engineers on cloud-native patterns, resulting in 78% reduction in production incidents and 45%
faster deployment cycles across platform services
Databricks — Senior Platform Engineer Mar 2020 - Jun 2022
Designed and deployed auto-scaling Spark cluster orchestration system reducing compute costs by $4.3M annually
while maintaining 98.5% cluster availability
Implemented comprehensive observability stack using Prometheus and Grafana across 200+ cloud instances,
decreasing mean time to detection (MTTD) from 18 minutes to 2.3 minutes
Led open-source contributions to Apache Spark project, authoring 8 PRs that improved task scheduling efficiency by
26%, adopted by 50K+ daily users
Lyft — Cloud Systems Engineer Sep 2017 - Feb 2020
Engineered containerized microservices deployment platform handling 2.5M requests/sec across 3K+ AWS EC2
instances, reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes
Optimized VPC network architecture and implemented custom DNS service, decreasing cross-availability zone
latency by 61% and saving $850K quarterly
Developed Python-based infrastructure-as-code framework for Terraform modules, enabling 120+ teams to provision
cloud resources self-serve, reducing ops tickets by 73%
Twilio — Junior Cloud Engineer Jun 2016 - Aug 2017
Implemented monitoring and alerting system for 15 production services using CloudWatch and PagerDuty,
responding to 340+ incidents with 94% resolution rate within SLA
Migrated legacy on-premises database workloads to RDS, achieving 55% cost reduction and enabling automatic
backups across 8 regions
PROJECTS
Multi-Cloud Cost Optimization Framework — Python, AWS Cost Explorer API, GCP Billing API, Terraform,2021 - 2022
RI/SP negotiation
Built automated cost analysis and reserved instance recommendation engine saving 42% on cloud spending across
500+ services
Implemented real-time billing alerts and chargeback system reducing resource waste by enforcing tagging standards
across 8,000+ infrastructure assets
Zero-Downtime Blue-Green Deployment System — Go, Kubernetes, AWS ALB, Helm, ArgoCD 2019 - 2020
Engineered blue-green deployment orchestrator enabling 50+ service teams to execute zero-downtime releases at
99.97% success rate
Reduced deployment rollback time from 12 minutes to 90 seconds through automated health checks and traffic
shifting strategies
EXTRACURRICULAR
Cloud Native Computing Foundation — Kubernetes Contributor & Reviewer 2018 - Present
Reviewed and merged 15+ pull requests improving kubelet resource management and reducing memory overhead
by 19%
Co-authored CNCF white paper on multi-cluster networking patterns adopted by 2,000+ organizations
HashiCorp Community — Terraform Module Maintainer 2019 - Present
Maintained 3 popular open-source Terraform modules with 150K+ downloads, providing enterprise AWS landing zone
templates
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Go, Bash, SQL, YAML, Java
Technologies – Kubernetes, Docker, Apache Spark, AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, ECS, Lambda), GCP (Compute
Engine, BigQuery), Terraform, CloudFormation, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog
Tools – Git, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD, Ansible, Helm, Vault, PagerDuty, Splunk, AWS CloudFormation
name: Tansy Burns
